case_title: JAMES BOLTON VS. SMART FOODSERVICE WAREHOUSE STORES

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $27.50) AMENDED SC-100 SERVED FEB-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT US FOODS, INC DBA US FOODSERVICE, INC
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **ADDITION OF 2 ADDITIONAL DEFENDANTS** FILED BY BOLTON, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SMART FOODSERVICE WAREHOUSE STORES
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOFS OF SERVICES.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT US FOODS, INC DBA US FOODSERVICE, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-24-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLTON, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMART FOODSERVICE WAREHOUSE STORES SMART & FINAL LLC US FOODS, INC DBA US FOODSERVICE, INC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,755.00, JUDGEMENT AGAINST ALL 3 DEFENDANTS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. JUDGEMENT IS BASED ON KAISER BENEFITS CHARGE $2,090.00, DR. AFLATOON CHARGE $1,500.00 & HEALTH DIAGNOSTICS MRI CHARGE OF $2,386.00 PLUS THE BALANCE FOR PAIN & SUFFERING. OTHER TREATMENTS ARE NOT REASONABLED NECESSARY OR OVER TREATMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125) AMENDED SC-100 SERVED MAR-23-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMART & FINAL LLC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL(BY DEFENDANT)**GRANTED** -EVEN THOUGH THIS IS UNTIMELY-FOLLOW FILING REQUIREMENTS IN THE FUTURE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF JAMES BOLTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SMART FOODSERVICE WAREHOUSE STORES, REPRESENTED BY DALIA JASSO, STORE MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SMART & FINAL LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT US FOODS, INC. DBA US FOODSERVICE, INC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT US FOODS INC DBA US FOODSERVICE, INC. APPEARING AS DEFENDANT US FOODS INC. CHEF STORE WAS PRESENT AT THE HEARING ON FEB-25-2022 PURSUANT TO FILED DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION FILED FEB-25-2022. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 5-24-22)
